description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black pole supporting a central globe-shaped lamp head at the top, flanked by three smaller spherical lamp fixtures arranged symmetrically around it. The lamp heads are enclosed in translucent, ribbed covers that diffuse light, giving the structure a classic yet functional appearance. The supporting arms for the side lamps extend outward from a central hub, creating a balanced, trident-like silhouette. The base of the pole is slightly thicker, suggesting stability and secure mounting to the ground. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional urban street lighting, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or plazas. There are no visible decorative embellishments or additional attachments on the structure.
description: A tall black lamppost with a central globe lamp and three smaller spherical lamps arranged symmetrically around it, featuring a classic, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central globe lamp and three evenly spaced side lamps, all clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, with the same arrangement of lamps visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with all four lamp heads visible in the same configuration.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to the others, showing the symmetrical lamp arrangement.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Spherical globe design with ribbed translucent covers, arranged in a trident formation
